title: Vishwaroopam 2
subTitle: Wisam Ahmad Kashmiri, a RAW agent, tries to prevent a terrorist organisation from executing a deadly mission against three countries.

title: Chandrakala
subTitle: A family moves into their ancestral mansion to try to sell it off. However, trouble starts brewing when they experience supernatural phenomena and a ghost mysteriously killing people.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: 90ML
subTitle: A man with fetal alcohol syndrome keeps himself alive by drinking a certain amount of alcohol. However, things change when he falls in love with a beautiful woman.

title: Kota Bommali PS
subTitle: A police officer is on the run after being wrongfully accused of a crime by a politician. A series of events unfolds as the officer evades multiple obstacles.

title: Raghuvaran B.Tech
subTitle: Raghuvaran, an educated yet unemployed engineer, is unwilling to accept jobs that are unrelated to his area of expertise. Soon, his mother's tragic death brings him a job as well as grave challenges.

title: Parugu
subTitle: A rich and powerful Neelakanta's perception about love marriage changes when both his daughters, Subbalakshmi and Meenakshi, fall in love.

title: Lucky Bhaskar
subTitle: A struggling bank teller takes a chance on a shady investment scheme with an unproven partner. Later, as his fortunes rise, so does his ego, driving him to take on increasingly reckless risks.

title: Bheema
subTitle: Orphan Bheema battles drug lord Dragon Manju and corrupt politicians who exploit the poor. His fight for justice clashes with crime and political schemes.

title: Arjun
subTitle: Arjun's twin sister, Meenakshi, marries Uday, her love, against his parents' wishes who decide to kill her in retaliation to the wedding. However, Arjun tries to save his sister from their wrath.

title: Krishna Babu
subTitle: Krishna, a village arbitrator, is respected by all. He falls in love with Rama, the headmaster's daughter, but their relationship is strained due to Krishna's dark past.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Manyam Puli
subTitle: Murugan, a truck driver, hunts and kills man-eating tigers to protect his village. However, things take a turn for the worse when Daddy, an illegal drugs dealer, enters the scene.

title: Viswam
subTitle: A man on a personal mission gets entangled in a larger plot when he foils a terrorist's plans and saves a young girl, the sole witness of a murder, from being killed.

title: Chatrapathi
subTitle: Separated from his family during a conflict, a refugee embarks on a mission to reunite with his adoptive family. However, he faces several challenges after his foster brother conspires against him.

title: Srinivasa Kalyanam
subTitle: Srinivas, an architect, wants to marry Sridevi, the daughter of a businessman in a traditional ceremony. Conflicts arise when his views on marriage don't align with that of Sridevi's father.

title: RRR
subTitle: A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

title: Sardaar Gabbar Singh
subTitle: The kingdom of Rathanpur is forced to face the wrath of Bhairav Singh, who unceremoniously usurps their land. They later find respite when Gabbar Singh, a brave policeman, takes on their oppressor.

title: Sardaar Gabbar Singh
subTitle: The kingdom of Rathanpur is forced to face the wrath of Bhairav Singh, who unceremoniously usurps their land. They later find respite when Gabbar Singh, a brave policeman, takes on their oppressor.

title: Ayyaare
subTitle: While Venkatesam and Anjali decide to get married, Anjali's father suddenly reverses his decision after seeking the advice of a priest, prompting Venkatesam to find out the reason.

title: Mask
subTitle: In an attempt to impress Shakthi, Bruce Lee dons a superhero costume and demonstrates his martial arts skills. However, he unexpectedly becomes involved in a police chase.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Pakka Commercial
subTitle: A dishonest lawyer takes on a notorious client. However, the case puts him against his morally-minded father, an ex-judge with a past of his own.

title: Subramanyam for Sale
subTitle: Subramanyam, a money-minded man, comes across Seetha, a woman living alone in the US after being abandoned by her boyfriend. Subsequently, he decides to help her after seeing her plight.

title: Sarkaru Vaari Paata
subTitle: Mahi tries to retrieve a large amount of money she loaned to her deceitful partner. However, she uncovers a giant banking scandal on her visit.

title: Raju Gari Gadhi 2
subTitle: A group of three young friends decides to invest in a resort. However, things become complicated when they realise that it is haunted and take help of a mentalist to track down the ghost.

title: Mirchi
subTitle: Manasa falls in love with Jai after he helps her and manages to win the hearts of her family with his good deeds. However, she is unaware that he belongs to a rival family.

title: Policeodu
subTitle: A police officer goes into hiding to bring up his daughter in a safe environment. However, after her life is threatened by deadly gangsters, he must face his past to protect his daughter.
